output.title: 3-Email Security Deposit Recovery Sequence: Demand Letter Urgency Campaign
output.meta_description: Recover your security deposit fast. Use state-specific demand letter templates and send a demand letter for security deposit recovery before your deadline. Start free.
content_outline: Email 1 — The Deadline Alert: Subject line targets 'landlord won't return security deposit' and 'how to get security deposit back'; body opens with state-mandated return windows (CA 21 days, NY 14 days, TX 30 days) and warns of triple-damage liability.

Email 2 — The Template & Proof: Subject line leads with 'security deposit demand letter template' and 'how to write security deposit letter'; body showcases DepositBack's state-specific generator, legal citation auto-fill, and certified mail instructions.

Email 3 — Final Escalation: Subject line uses 'security deposit return letter' and 'security deposit refund letter'; body frames the demand letter as the final written proof required before small claims court, reinforcing urgency to act before evidence grows stale.
key_points: Subject 1: 'Your landlord has 14 days. Where's your $[Amount] security deposit?' — Body hook: countdown to state deadline + legal penalties for non-payment.
Subject 2: 'Free security deposit demand letter template (ready in 60 seconds)' — Body hook: no lawyer needed; auto-generates a demand letter for security deposit with proper state statutes.

Subject 3: 'Last notice: Send your security deposit refund letter before suing' — Body hook: positions the security deposit return letter as the final documentation needed to recover double or treble damages.

Keyword integration: security deposit demand letter, letter to landlord about security deposit, security deposit letter to landlord, demand letter for security deposit, and security deposit refund letter woven naturally into body copy.
Urgency drivers: ticking statutory deadlines, threat of forfeiture, court cost recovery, and certified-mail tracking to prove delivery.
output.cta: Generate your free security deposit demand letter now and recover what's yours before the legal deadline passes.
output.target_audience: U.S. renters who have moved out within the last 30-60 days and have not received their security deposit refund, especially those facing non-responsive landlords or unfair deductions.
